action.reasoning: Observation: Best so far is MSE 0.4867 (iter 4, 8-epoch DLinear+NLinear). Iter 5 longer training (25 epochs) gave worse 0.5015 due to overfitting. Analysis: The classic best DLinear/NLinear ETTh1 96->720 is ~0.46. Pure NLinear is known to be best on ETTh1 long-horizon. Let me try a simpler shared-weight NLinear (channel-shared) with proper regularization. Also: use train+val together? No, can't peek at val. Use weight decay and fewer epochs. Try simple NLinear shared weights with light training. Decision: Build pure NLinear (one shared linear or per-channel) with weight decay and ~10 epochs, save best by val.
